description: Enable 'Interleaved 2 of 5' (ITF) scanning in bcWebCam. Then, scan the barcode shown on the camera feed (or visible on the screen). Use the decoded Bates number to rename the file 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\LegalCase\evidence_document.pdf' to match the exact numeric string decoded (e.g., if it scans '0481516234', rename the file to '0481516234.pdf').
